Everything -- everything -- is on the line right now.

Billionaire Tom Steyer just pumped $47 million of his own money to buy a spot in the next debates.

Meanwhile, if Julian doesn't raise $800,000 by the next 5 days -- **he will have no choice but to exit this race.** ** ** | ****MUST RAISE: $800,000**** ** ** ****NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**** ** ** | **[**_Suggested Support: $5 >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191026_em_fr_b4_jcls_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

Now, more than ever, we need to rise up and rescue his spot in the next round.

We can't risk losing such an important voice in this race.

Will you rush $5?

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc844/3eb3e2fc/5504fdd6/744da067/2563634518/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc844/3eb3e2fc/5504fdd6/744da066/2563634518/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc844/3eb3e2fc/5504fdd6/744da065/2563634518/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Yang
subject: Falling short isn’t an option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Undecided voters like Andrew Yang the best, according to a recent survey from Business Insider.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2180%2E377263%2ETuXiAO) **“Yang is making waves in the primary by drawing on his unique expertise as an entrepreneur and businessman to sound the alarm about the rise of mass automation in America.”

\- _Business Insider_

[Reaching our goal means that we can reach more voters -- pitch in $5 today.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15213?t=5&akid=2180%2E377263%2ETuXiAO) ** Yang Gang --

Undecided voters like Andrew Yang the best, according to a recent survey from _Business Insider_. That’s why it is critical to introduce Andrew to as many voters as possible in the early primary states.

To do that, we have announced an ambitious goal of $1.5 million by the end of October so we can increase our visibility in the early primary states. [Contribute $5 to our goal today so we can invest in ad buys to reach voters.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15213?t=13&akid=2180%2E377263%2ETuXiAO) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15213?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2180%2E377263%2ETuXiAO)

---
We are on the rise -- and we can’t stop now. We have only **5 days** left to reach our goal. Falling short is not an option.

**Pitching in all you can now will let us make the critical investments that we need to expand the Yang Gang.**
[Pitch in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15213?t=6&akid=2180%2E377263%2ETuXiAO)
---
Thank you,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15213?t=14&akid=2180%2E377263%2ETuXiAO)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2180%2E377263%2ETuXiAO) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2180%2E377263%2ETuXiAO) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Sign the petition: Stop the Green New Scam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand For America
body:
I am reaching out to you because I want to make your voice heard.
If you wish to unsubscribe, visit [here](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6480891/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5kbXNncy5uZXQvdT9pZD0xMzYwNjgxOTUuMTU3NDk2ZTNhYjU2NmU1NGRmOGE4YTlkYTIyYjY0OTImbj1UJmw9YS1ncyZvPTY0ODA4OTE%3d&x=cfdb5392)

[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6480891/136068195/109865/2/)

Friend,
I am reaching out to you because I want to make your voice heard.
**Liberals continue to go around the country touting their radical climate change agenda.**
Front and center was their **"Green New Deal."** Or as we at Stand For America have come to call it, the **�Green New Scam."** **The candidates touted everything from putting limits on red meat consumption, to promoting abortion in third world countries to control the population!**
We must stand up to these liberals, and let them know that we don�t support this radical agenda!
[**Sign the petition today to stop the Green New Scam >>>**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6480891/136068195/109865/3/)
This is a critical time in our nation's history. Ideas that were once widely accepted as radical are now being pushed as mainstream. **I need your help** to fight back, and show these radicals that **we need realistic solutions** to our problems, not irrational ideas that **hurt hardworking Americans.**
[**Sign the petition today to stop the Green New Scam >>>**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6480891/136068195/109865/4/)
Our nation is teetering between moving forward as a stronger and more prosperous one and falling backwards into a country where the government controls every aspect of our everyday lives.
We must move forward on a path to prosperity, and Stand For America is going to fight for that every day.
I hope to hear from you!
My very best,
[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6480891/136068195/109865/5/)

[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6480891/136068195/75219/6/)

Paid for by Stand For America
---

PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: This is it‼️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Sheriff Joe Arpaio
body:
I'm getting nervous I may have to wave the white flag. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53273331:W7E0oOwNa:m:1:2105898951:D4F963EE3661556FDBE6C6A52AAABA3B:r)
---
N/A,

In less than one week my campaign will be facing a make or break moment and honestly, I'm getting nervous I may have to wave the white flag. **[You see, I'm still behind my October fundraising goal and if I don't raise an additional $35,000 before midnight-](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53273331:W7E0oOwNa:m:1:2105898951:D4F963EE3661556FDBE6C6A52AAABA3B:r)** this race is officially over for me.

It takes a lot to rock me, but the stakes this election are too high to play it cool. **[Would you consider supporting my America First campaign by donating $10, $25, $50, $100 or even more before midnight?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53273331:W7E0oOwNa:m:1:2105898951:D4F963EE3661556FDBE6C6A52AAABA3B:r)**

| [ **MIDNIGHT DEADLINE ➩ ➩**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53273331:W7E0oOwNa:m:1:2105898951:D4F963EE3661556FDBE6C6A52AAABA3B:r)
---

As the Sheriff of Maricopa County for over two decades, I had a front row seat to the dangers facing our communities _each and every day._

While Democrats continue their calls for amnesty, open borders, and sanctuary cities I'm preparing to win this race and get back to work. That means **locking up** violent criminals, human traffickers, and gang members who, oh by the way, **_enter our country illegally._**

N/A, the **status quo** is unacceptable. **[But in order for me to continue my fight against the D.C. Swamp and ending the immigration crisis plaguing our country, I need to hear from you.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53273331:W7E0oOwNa:m:1:2105898951:D4F963EE3661556FDBE6C6A52AAABA3B:r)**

I still need to raise $35,000 before midnight. **[Can I count you in?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53273331:W7E0oOwNa:m:1:2105898951:D4F963EE3661556FDBE6C6A52AAABA3B:r)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

[ **MIDNIGHT DEADLINE ➩ ➩**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53273331:W7E0oOwNa:m:1:2105898951:D4F963EE3661556FDBE6C6A52AAABA3B:r)
---

| Paid for by Re-Elect Sheriff Joe Arpaio

Time and again, **Dan Crenshaw puts special interests over the voices of hardworking Texans, and we’ve had enough.**
Last quarter, Dan Crenshaw took $2,500 from the GEO Group, a for-profit prison company that is inhumanely incarcerating migrants. **This is heartless.** Dan Crenshaw does not represent us or our values. It’s time for him to go.
_[**Chip in $25 or whatever you can to help Elisa unseat Dan Crenshaw and become our next Congresswoman.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11257055/114434923/-1740796449?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWE5MDAxMi1jMmY4LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LlvCeTxRppLfEwZiKUST4pur2KdXcLvaNi7511cNI2g=&refcode=1027eom&amount=25&recurring=1)_

We need your help to fight for our values, Peter, **and our first order of business is unseating Dan Crenshaw.**

clean_body: Peter, Time and again, Dan Crenshaw puts special interests over the voices of hardworking Texans, and we’ve had enough. Last quarter, Dan Crenshaw took $2,500 from the GEO Group, a for-profit prison company that is inhumanely incarcerating migrants. This is heartless. Dan Crenshaw does not represent us or our values. It’s time for him to go. With our November 1st fundraising deadline quickly approaching, we have a chance to prove that the power of the people will always prevail over corporate PAC dollars. Together, we can stop our tax dollars from enriching companies that profit off of human rights abuses. We need your help to fight for our values, Peter, and our first order of business is unseating Dan Crenshaw. | | | | | | | | | Thank you for all that you do, Khadijah Naeem Campaign Finance Director Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

Friend,

**We at Team Sri would love to wish everyone a Happy Diwali!** Diwali is the Hindu festival of lights celebrated each year honoring Lord Ram's victory over the Demon King Ravana, and it is celebrated by more than a billion Hindus around the globe. **As lamps are lit across homes to signify the victory of light over darkness, we hope you 'll join us -- ****whether you celebrate Diwali or not -- ****in honoring this humble reminder to continue spreading positivity, joy, and compassion in our fight against the forces of hatred, hostility, and divisiveness.** So, Happy Diwali from all of us at Team Sri and may the sacred lamps illuminate your life and the lives of your loved ones! \-- Team Sri | **[DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWKvfd18i_HS-kvJsRPcD693JCWSZv9K8HudebP4gOA=/P6MgsVvF8EIf3n6-AMjDpw9AYo8uQtQt3Ds3EZSIKyo=?refcode=20191027email)**

name: Mark
subject: In less than 10 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Derek, in less than 10 days, Virginians will head to the polls and decide the future of our Commonwealth. That's all the time we have between now and Election Day.
|
---
| | Derek, in less than 10 days, Virginians will head to the polls and decide the future of our Commonwealth. That's all the time we have between now and Election Day.

**We must win in 2019 AND in 2020.** If we're able to flip the General Assembly **this year** , we'll be that much closer to keeping Virginia blue in 2020. By preventing my seat from falling into a Trump-supporting Republican's hands, **we 'll have a much better chance of retaking the Senate.**

And a Democratic Senate majority will be able to -- finally -- pass commonsense legislation that'll benefit every American.

**Can you donate today to help me defend my seat in 2020 and protect our hard-earned progress?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through name: Josh Mahony
subject: I'm worried
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
We need to close this gap to put Arkansas First.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-oct-eom?refcode=em191027EOM1&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| Arkansans are frustrated, and you know what? They should be.

Our political leaders like Tom Cotton in Washington have broken our trust -- telling the folks back home that they are looking out for you and then turning around and voting against your interests is the Washington way of doing things.

**Let me be clear -- I'm not interested in doing things the Washington way. I'm only interested in doing things the Arkansas way. And that means we put Arkansas First, and we do it together.**

**[I'm worried that we won't close our fundraising gap. Can I count on you to rush a contribution of $5 before my midnight deadline? We still need to bring in $9,821 more to hit our October grassroots fundraising goal and ensure we have the resources to stand up for Arkansans.](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-oct-eom?refcode=em191027EOM1&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $5](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-oct-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em191027EOM1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-oct-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em191027EOM1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $100](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-oct-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em191027EOM1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Donate Other Amount](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-oct-eom?refcode=em191027EOM1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Cotton voted not once, not twice, but three times to make it harder for 1.2 million Arkansans with pre-existing conditions to afford health insurance.

Our farmers are taking it on the chin in the escalating trade wars, only to have Cotton tell them that their sacrifice is not as great as others.

Our infrastructure is crumbling, and no one is doing anything about it.

That's the Washington Elitist way of doing things.

**There is another way, and it starts with building a grassroots team of supporters like you to stand up for Arkansas.**

**[I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important, friend, so please: Rush a contribution of $5 or whatever you can now and help us put Arkansas First.](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-oct-eom?refcode=em191027EOM1&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Let's do this together,

Josh

If you want a senator who speaks for you and isn't bought and paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting. name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: the end of my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Allow me to be vulnerable with you for a moment. These could be the final days of my campaign. I'm not a billionaire like other candidates. I don't have the personal wealth to buy my way onto the next debate stage. **[_The only shot I have to share my message with you -- to keep speaking truth to power -- to frankly keep my race going -- is to reach my $800,000 End of Month goal. If I can 't hit my goal, I will be forced to exit this race. I'm counting on your $5 in this do-or-die moment. >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191027_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** I wasn't born into privilege. I started this campaign on a shoestring budget in my home neighborhood. I didn't have personal wealth to pump into this race. But we've built this campaign without a cent from super PACs or billionaires. **I 've spent every second in this race fighting for folks who have struggled like I have -- now, I'm asking you to fight for me.** I am in dire need of reaching my $800k goal, or I will have to bow out of this race. I'm counting on your $5 more than you know: _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc845/3eb3e2fc/550bb39d/744dad80/3002230209/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191027_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs")**

| | Paid for by Julian for the Future

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

| | Trump's EPA Administer DISBANDED a group of top scientists tasked with studying the nation's air quality -- before they could issue a public report about their findings. But now they're fighting back: Trump's EPA Administer **DISBANDED** a group of top scientists tasked with studying the nation's air quality -- **before they could issue a public report about their findings.** **But now they 're fighting back:** [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf0be/3556523346/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2") _**This is UNPRECEDENTED!**_ We need [7] more voters from your area to take our War on Science Survey. **[Do you believe that more scientists need to speak out against the Trump Administration's dangerous War on Science?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf0bd/3556523346/VEsE/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Do+you+believe+that+more+scientists+need&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2")** | | | [Weigh In >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf0bc/3556523346/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Weigh+In+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2")
---
The Trump Administration is waging a **coordinated attack** on scientists and scientific findings -- **to help protect the giant corporate polluters** that are funding Trump's re-election campaign.
_The American public deserves to know the chemicals we are breathing in our air and drinking in our water._
But the only way the Trump Administration will back down is if we launch a **MAJOR RESISTANCE** to their war on science that they can't ignore.
[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf0bb/3556523346/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2")
We need to hear from you now -- the poll closes in 24 hours: **[www.314Action.org/FactsMatter](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf0ba/3556523346/VEsD/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+www314ActionorgFactsMatter&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2")**
Thanks for weighing in,
314 Action

| [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf0b9/3556523346/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://www.314action.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2")

| | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf0b8/3556523346/VEsB/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://www.314actionfund.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2"), not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf087/3556523346/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44f3/4bd7760e/44e35312/77adf086/3556523346/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_EPAResist_191027_U2_X2")

subject: ISIS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi is dead. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5b389177807f35cd3a3950c7ff10ab7ed5975bc4a9b8ae3ef2dca51b36cd0e13a585dcf97b5f67d6bff2be173a4de77c8464efb6a317090c)
---

Friend,

It is a great day for the United States of America, and for the rest of the world.

**Under the fierce leadership of our Commander-in-Chief, the radical ISIS leader, Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi is dead.** Terrorists should never sleep soundly knowing that the U.S. will completely destroy them.

Our Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen and Marines are the very best, and thanks to their bravery and President Trump's leadership, **WE ARE KEEPING AMERICA SAFE!**

Unfortunately, Fake News CNN hates President Trump more than they love our country. They completely disrespected our brave men and women in the military by cutting OFF the President's very important announcement to the Nation.

They can't stand that President Trump is keeping his promises to put AMERICA FIRST, so they're trying to SILENCE his message before millions of Americans. RIDICULOUS! _But, the President has never cared about what the corrupt media thinks, he only cares what YOU think._
---

**[Please take our Official Poll TODAY to let President Trump know what you think about his recent job performance.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5b389177807f35cdd0a0debeb35ee0c40489756499b8a6c241bd0c9e6984611779132c5d8b92f4ba4325875b07670ab4757675a0dbc766d5)**
**How would you rate President Trump 's recent job performance? ** [GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5b389177807f35cd7f23bfb7141fc4098e075cfe06820f05a89b917e6e98739a0697453362a48c056b0d164f8ec26a313b201f8dcc7c0062) [GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5b389177807f35cdea0ec72f8d95b828cd0b62251665b09e963b4b1f08953fbcfe10b8e674ad26a67ba5b8fb32a3ea0b5e4b91e674e3369b) [OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5b389177807f35cd5908cee700948ee4224fa99e915f5728676fb2f465888d9f97cf377f4ad640320ed2b9eadb08aa3b36138574b0f01e60) [OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5b389177807f35cdf11f7368809e83c8a48c87adf4fdc7aded4f3f85cdee3d20ed2e399d5f79fb68667f545c36251453a342b8022959b5b6) President Trump has been working hard to put _America First_ for YOU and your family. Just take a look at some of his recent accomplishments that will **Keep America Safe:**
* **Bringing the world 's #1 terrorist leader to justice**
* **Successfully decimating ISIS**
* **Securing our Southern Border by building THE WALL**
* **Working to denuclearize North Korea**
* **Restoring and rebuilding American military strength**

---
| Our President has accomplished more for our Nation than any other President in the history of the United States, and now, he wants to know what YOU think about his recent job performance.

_We 're giving him ALL RESPONSES by tomorrow morning._ Will he see YOURS on there?

**[Take our Official Poll by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to tell President Trump what you think.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5b389177807f35cd3c7d0efec3373e2833abd6a18791facdce77798b1d00eeaf265b7ac8bf1ac51882e4db02ca5a694fe85d5444c42bedf1)**

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020

[TAKE THE POLL NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5b389177807f35cd960fba6d4944516dc55ecf8f6e762a9e9a69ec162fb67888911d84ebd0e9c338f27eaf1cb8fb2d9fcee9bffcafac32f1)

name: Cory Booker
subject: An update on the December debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, here's an update on the DNC debate requirements. **FIRST:** The DNC announced that each candidate must have 130,000 unique donors to qualify for the September and October debates -- and this grassroots team came together to make sure this campaign was not counted out. **THEN:** The DNC raised that threshold to 165,000 unique donors for the November debate -- and we blew past that requirement as well. **NOW:** The DNC raised the threshold for the December debate to 200,000 unique donors -- _and we 're not there yet._ **Will you make your first donation today -- even $1 counts -- to help us make the next debate stage?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191027_CB_20191027-fr-CB-FTNdebate-actives_express1&amount=1&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We're going to need all hands on deck to meet the DNC's new requirement. But this team has never been one to shy away from a challenge -- that's why I'm confident that we'll get there.
**[So team, will you chip in right now to help us reach the 200,000 unique donors we need to qualify for the December debate?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191027_CB_20191027-fr-CB-FTNdebate-actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

clean_body: | | | | Hey team, here's an update on the DNC debate requirements. FIRST: The DNC announced that each candidate must have 130,000 unique donors to qualify for the September and October debates -- and this grassroots team came together to make sure this campaign was not counted out. THEN: The DNC raised that threshold to 165,000 unique donors for the November debate -- and we blew past that requirement as well. NOW: The DNC raised the threshold for the December debate to 200,000 unique donors -- and we 're not there yet. Will you make your first donation today -- even $1 counts -- to help us make the next debate stage? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "=" | "=" | "=" | "=" | "=" | "=" We're going to need all hands on deck to meet the DNC's new requirement. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Americans want to vote -- but the GOP doesn't want them to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, College student voter participation has historically been low, especially in midterm elections, but 2018 changed that. Participation doubled to 40%, helping to facilitate the massive blue wave that retook the House \-- and Republicans took notice. The GOP knows that it doesn't have any good ideas to convince people to vote for Republican candidates, so instead they have to keep people from voting in the first place, and college students are their latest target. In Texas, the state legislature passed a law that shuttered early polling stations at campuses across the state, early polling stations where tens of thousands of ballots have been cast in past elections. These efforts are voter suppression pure and simple. Republicans have argued that the barriers they are raising around voting are about stopping illegal voting and voter fraud \-- but there's absolutely no evidence of that. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House, we have to allow everyone who is eligible to vote \-- and we have to stop the GOP from cheating. When Democrats Turn Out is committed to ensuring that everyone can vote, but we need to hear from engaged Democrats on this critical issue: **Should we protect voting rights?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc56/6e9863e8/15c5d938/1db0891e/3282893368/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6dR7yyZk") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc56/6e9863e8/15c5d938/1db0891e/3282893368/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6dR7yyZk") Thanks for your support. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc56/6e9863e8/15c5d938/1db0891c/3282893368/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191027a.ND-b&refcode2=JRqP7bhyYE3KtGfnqNVd")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc56/6e9863e8/15c5d938/1db08963/3282893368/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B) **We need you to step up to hit our goal before midnight on October 31.

[Can we count on you? Pitch in here.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=5&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B) ** Yang Gang --

When we set a fundraising goal for our campaign, we ask ourselves two questions:
1. Do we have a realistic chance of hitting it?
2. Will hitting this goal make a meaningful difference in how we will make decisions about where we allocate resources in this campaign?

When we set our $1.5 million goal by the end of October, we asked ourselves these questions and the answer was yes to both.

But right now, things are not looking good. With less than a week to go, we’re just under $1 million short. So we need you to step up if we’re going to get back on track. [Can you pitch in now to help close the gap?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=13&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=7&amount=25&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B)
---
Keep checking Yang2020.com for real-time updates on our progress. We can’t wait to (hopefully) share the surprise with you!

Let’s do this,

Carly Reilly
Finance Director, Yang 2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15243?t=6&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2182%2E377263%2Ey3tZ5B) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: Waving the white flag🏳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Sheriff Joe Arpaio
body:
I’m getting nervous I may have to wave the white flag.I’m getting nervous I may have to wave the white flag. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_s=078af9e3baf84d38877606f462bb980e&_t=MR7C9b3RsHt1ojO61FS4iNvIhdkS-NzhRHI5sF06vZDh8CbFxBqTT8yqfjt8M8epKK9TkP-yqV3GlyPXZcknTWbg6Zo9gc2SR6cAdKMpp7Wmyw01zKgTwtCDY3t9kX8LYF6dGe4RwFMVT6goqB2rb7bIDD7QchJ5gQ74xgvA5cQ%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=078af9e3baf84d38877606f462bb980e&_e=FRYThMWHYyliZ_ifFoWZLjKyqf-e3whdKPs4k5lMa4as2XcTpwEffaoId-kPdO4OHgGrNXBnG_yGrsbMLhbGt4pkH2dSpxZC-SBDbTN1eGahr74GI9jVLy-axt-9i3UVQlA2oEGj6z2pKiS4KPc9lNVI5jV88FbRTeZBaNJ-Cet3lD9V73kjv4zltK6AVccp1iKwWz16n3GvvLENoHoLIlJO5cdItAKFXiPUd1rjU_ICh7xCgsTC9KSQ7ahGNxwSaibf9bR6xeelGKzpJeiwjmGKuK_k96vDZXRBlLRPignmk7EtseGNiVUCh8xbDXoMEadBNGT0iUb5-QO5wrMYIOn2Quul4c0nEjZQQoC3n5KkvEsQq-DqtIyyiWBC-zXrB5iNT4bcf1fo-bLiHXG1-A%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

In less than one week my campaign will be facing a make or break moment and honestly, I’m getting nervous I may have to wave the white flag. **[You see, I’m still behind my October fundraising goal and if I don’t raise an additional $35,000 before midnight –](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=078af9e3baf84d38877606f462bb980e&_e=FRYThMWHYyliZ_ifFoWZLjKyqf-e3whdKPs4k5lMa4as2XcTpwEffaoId-kPdO4OHgGrNXBnG_yGrsbMLhbGt4pkH2dSpxZC-SBDbTN1eGahr74GI9jVLy-axt-9i3UVQlA2oEGj6z2pKiS4KPc9lNVI5jV88FbRTeZBaNJ-Cet3lD9V73kjv4zltK6AVccpx_d9LFVO2pfrX0XTIF8XQmC2q2rLceHqiQ_vcPCl-nJpG5Q8PN0z3Cg27i2Wrn3kJMEJiUtq5McxvAO1aJq9Oy55r0eOhKsCeE_u8wyXkpt1PIl1vEYmWxq9rKdt9Zzd-16FtMkP5bV36lyIkFfQpKFuB903SaxrMJbDidhc6ZyOK8rZfB36mTnbnSAqRhilnPXkVYSTvUaNggiJkAsiQw%3D%3D)** this race is officially over for me.

It takes a lot to rock me, but the stakes this election are too high to play it cool. **[Would you consider supporting my America First campaign by donating $10, $25, $50, $100 or even more before midnight?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=078af9e3baf84d38877606f462bb980e&_e=FRYThMWHYyliZ_ifFoWZLjKyqf-e3whdKPs4k5lMa4as2XcTpwEffaoId-kPdO4OHgGrNXBnG_yGrsbMLhbGt4pkH2dSpxZC-SBDbTN1eGahr74GI9jVLy-axt-9i3UVQlA2oEGj6z2pKiS4KPc9lNVI5jV88FbRTeZBaNJ-Cet3lD9V73kjv4zltK6AVccpXCKF5Fc3DSNavaEWv0HvM_trnjMrRByC2Q16QXrn74eti3EgeG-i0-ybMVSe7CBJajpJ6C1DDQFMURytLOycbvMca7xl-bWzcD20iUFLvuFvscgmHFpUvl9bp6WoNcdJI6IyTea_kWgKyonHvB8sxOWXxxWctr0ygGoVc5UZOCdHJf0qPdi7PQhKop-YSh7LKVcUxzdf-ML-xNFcXHD72g%3D%3D)**
| [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE ➩ ➩**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=078af9e3baf84d38877606f462bb980e&_e=FRYThMWHYyliZ_ifFoWZLjKyqf-e3whdKPs4k5lMa4as2XcTpwEffaoId-kPdO4OHgGrNXBnG_yGrsbMLhbGt4pkH2dSpxZC-SBDbTN1eGahr74GI9jVLy-axt-9i3UVQlA2oEGj6z2pKiS4KPc9lNVI5jV88FbRTeZBaNJ-Cet3lD9V73kjv4zltK6AVccpiG_XLMbG-69IfH7h0gMgTsNGH_DLBw2AW4OVETgGpqp-IdkhipqPp3g_5mQuB1u_u_zNQPBeGdtuAhSVnY57jcv0PDgrKRhLInIT89QhOFM071rbIxTAz7yIVSvNrYXRzHFRMVVMWN1jv8C9dfaJnFMwuvCf7nI_lCXR5yzcGwZ2iszB4NrQbDAOwEi1PYPEFLrrSfs2qC4i26rifZ0txQ%3D%3D)
---

As the Sheriff of Maricopa County for over two decades, I had a front row seat to the dangers facing our communities _each and every day._

While Democrats continue their calls for amnesty, open borders, and sanctuary cities I’m preparing to win this race and get back to work. That means **locking up** violent criminals, human traffickers, and gang members who, oh by the way, **_enter our country illegally._**

Friend, the **status quo** is unacceptable. **[But in order for me to continue my fight against the D.C. Swamp and ending the immigration crisis plaguing our country, I need to hear from you.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=078af9e3baf84d38877606f462bb980e&_e=FRYThMWHYyliZ_ifFoWZLjKyqf-e3whdKPs4k5lMa4as2XcTpwEffaoId-kPdO4OHgGrNXBnG_yGrsbMLhbGt4pkH2dSpxZC-SBDbTN1eGahr74GI9jVLy-axt-9i3UVQlA2oEGj6z2pKiS4KPc9lNVI5jV88FbRTeZBaNJ-Cet3lD9V73kjv4zltK6AVccpa1prT3wTIYbo5Ob72m4xyo6VNHVmy4p6SYG2LG1Ao7VZWA3vkcoBpgtGIkkspSQHjP1BRL3Gu8RoWRpQKvydQv-bbqvoxsbYSPxd7CWJ_aNP2TFCm9Ohb5Y-0W6LKhR9ZCYvGj9zjYT5xsp8HTsx_ZIvkQcbAnaEkupgRVspWVC1fs0Sy_o8rkQY0tgHoyc7NndOObU6LquKu0S0DUoO-w%3D%3D)**

I still need to raise $35,000 before midnight. **[Can I count you in?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=078af9e3baf84d38877606f462bb980e&_e=FRYThMWHYyliZ_ifFoWZLjKyqf-e3whdKPs4k5lMa4as2XcTpwEffaoId-kPdO4OHgGrNXBnG_yGrsbMLhbGt4pkH2dSpxZC-SBDbTN1eGahr74GI9jVLy-axt-9i3UVQlA2oEGj6z2pKiS4KPc9lNVI5jV88FbRTeZBaNJ-Cet3lD9V73kjv4zltK6AVccpt6QfDaDVz5_iBj6-ZeAKRYdCMUTWTjHm7oT_8zxtvbQ1obucNoLnj6EBRSFzmU-McEDhK_F-zL2te7MpCWJFmOCkSu0oho0yiSc85GuwkY-bBIc4CJOvQS2GyE_btfHsGYyEeTIhOKoZx06uVlcHtut-BwkB28etAI_Ezg_l7TfwyUMOC_vT8ZnM3N0qThQm2CBV3AEoAjcFR2_gFr8T0w%3D%3D)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio
[**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE ➩ ➩**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=078af9e3baf84d38877606f462bb980e&_e=FRYThMWHYyliZ_ifFoWZLjKyqf-e3whdKPs4k5lMa4as2XcTpwEffaoId-kPdO4OHgGrNXBnG_yGrsbMLhbGt4pkH2dSpxZC-SBDbTN1eGahr74GI9jVLy-axt-9i3UVQlA2oEGj6z2pKiS4KPc9lNVI5jV88FbRTeZBaNJ-Cet3lD9V73kjv4zltK6AVccpWM9b0_MZxl8LHNh-XDJrZdkixeh3gL6MWahqvriwK7TqETfq8JocYrgoVl7Ccccwof7zmQjzPYzQvFre-iyNG-ADWzM4f9FkuM_EKUYBxyzT3Ik2JxUKa1UJlHejwTT9yvme9XhRMNnJw_lzw6yMQfriPClSwmyRUVfulPzhB2b0PJIoI7cUFT8PZpe-0voDb0xRad8s_1GzWa55HJiGgA%3D%3D)
---

name: Megan West
subject: [VIDEO] How can you activate other Christians to care?
body:
| | In this interview Pastor Hibbs explains the challenging cultural movement christians face today.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kyztTH7V2fVLUQJT5cwEvhg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=1)
| Peter, What do you do when your pastor doesn't encourage your church to take a stand on the cultural issues of our day? For nearly three decades, Pastor Jack Hibbs, Senior Pastor of Calvary Chapel Chino Hills in California, has worked to awaken pastors and Christians to their responsibility to pray, think and act when their faith is at a crossroads with culture. We sat down with [Pastor Hibbs](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kyztTH7V2fVLUQJT5cwEvhg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=2) at his church in Southern California where we discussed the challenging cultural movement Christians face today. I know you’ll be encouraged by his wisdom, his passion, and his ability to bring biblical truth to some of the big topics on the table today. | | _"If the Christian abandons the place where we can pick our leader, something is going to fill the void. When the lights go off, darkness fills the void."_ Pastor Jack Hibbs
---|---
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kyztTH7V2fVLUQJT5cwEvhg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=3)
We discussed what’s happening in California, the recently introduced sex-education curriculum, the growing attacks on the definition of gender, and how we, as active Christians, can share with others the importance of caring about the issues.
| _"We’ve somehow swallowed some bill of goods that says to us, ‘Pastors, Christians, we cannot speak into these political issues,’ but have we not noticed in these last several decades that the politicians declare, or rob from us a biblical issue, and then claim it to be a political issue? The definition of marriage, is an unborn baby viable or not - the answer to those questions in a debate is in the Bible."_ Pastor Jack Hibbs
---|---
Despite the attacks on our values, and the challenging cultural moment, Pastor Jack Hibbs brings us a message of incredible hope that will inspire and equip you to help reach your church and other Christians to take action.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kyztTH7V2fVLUQJT5cwEvhg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=4)
**Pray. Think. Vote.**
Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=5)
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=6).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191027com01&n=9)

name: Team Hick
subject: Want to make sure you saw this (Gardner on impeachment)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Cory Gardner has been a reliable, shameless yes-man for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's agenda. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149f/691c9bd/6fd71b07/11a7899b/1232586219/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team--we want to make sure you saw this:

**Cory Gardner just co-sponsored a resolution in the Senate that condemns the impeachment inquiry into Donald Trump.**

We deserve the facts, but by supporting this, Cory Gardner is siding with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell over the interests of Coloradans.

John has said for months that there's already enough evidence of misconduct from Donald Trump to launch an impeachment inquiry.

Cory Gardner has been a reliable, shameless yes-man for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's agenda--and that's why their allies have made it known they will funnel millions to hold on to Cory Gardner's seat.

We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back. Since we aren't taking a single penny of corporate PAC money (a promise John made on day one), we're relying on your support today.

[**_Will you chip in before our end-of-month deadline to help make this Cory Gardner 's final term in Congress--and Mitch McConnell's last as majority leader?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191027_TH_20191027-fr-TH-impeach-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

We deserve a senator who will always put people ahead of politics.

Thanks for all you do,

Team Hick [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191027_TH_20191027-fr-TH-impeach-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. clean_body: Cory Gardner has been a reliable, shameless yes-man for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's agenda. | | | "" | Team--we want to make sure you saw this: Cory Gardner just co-sponsored a resolution in the Senate that condemns the impeachment inquiry into Donald Trump. We deserve the facts, but by supporting this, Cory Gardner is siding with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell over the interests of Coloradans. John has said for months that there's already enough evidence of misconduct from Donald Trump to launch an impeachment inquiry. Cory Gardner has been a reliable, shameless yes-man for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's agenda--and that's why their allies have made it known they will funnel millions to hold on to Cory Gardner's seat. We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back. Since we aren't taking a single penny of corporate PAC money (a promise John made on day one), we're relying on your support today. name: Team Beto
subject: Starting tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Hi,

We have a huge week ahead of us. To be frank with you –– a lot of people
will be watching our campaign and whether we rise to the challenges we’re
facing.

Our Democratic opponents are watching whether we’re going to be able to
get the last qualifying polls we need to get Beto on the debate stage in
November.

Trump and the NRA will be watching if the money they’ve been pouring into
attack ads smearing Beto are working. They’re determined to make an
example out of Beto and scare Democrats from fighting for gun reform.

The media will be watching if we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal on
Thursday and announce to the world whether we have the funds to run a
competitive campaign.

So if you’ve been watching our campaign and waiting for an important
moment to chip in to our campaign –– we’ve never needed your help more
than we do now. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40214?refcode=ema20191027-other-63925&t=1019&akid=63925%2E444211%2EtmjXDx ]Please chip in $3 and give us the
resources we need to meet every challenge we’re facing this week.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40214?refcode=ema20191027-63925&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=63925%2E444211%2EtmjXDx ]Contribute $3

When it comes to overcoming challenges, our grassroots movement knows a
thing or two about defying the odds.

So speaking from experience –– trust us when we say that we can meet the
challenges we face this week –– but it just depends on how many of our
supporters choose to step up and believe that we are powerful when we
fight together.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40214?refcode=ema20191027-other-63925&t=1021&akid=63925%2E444211%2EtmjXDx ]Will you chip in $3 and help us start this week strong
as everyone begins to watch how our campaign rises to this critical
moment?

–Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40214?refcode=ema20191027-63925&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=63925%2E444211%2EtmjXDx ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=63925%2E444211%2EtmjXDx

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Andrew
subject: Our GOTV program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
This race is close, and the difference between winning and losing will come down to turnout.
|
---

| | Peter,

We said from Day One that we were going to knock on one million doors. **Thanks to you, we just surpassed 750,000. Supporters like you have enabled us to finish building this awesome program, and that means we 'll be able to knock on an extra 50,000 doors this week alone.** | [](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579a5/ad6dc73/144ad68d/db713f6/1445357932/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQwMiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-fieldfundoct?refcode=20191027.1nd__402__&amount=15")
---
What I hear back the most from our field organizers and volunteers is how appreciative voters are that we're taking the time to engage with them in their communities. And that they can't wait to vote for Andy and Jacqueline.

That's why every single dollar that we raise into our GOTV Fund is going to make all the difference. **This race is close, and the difference between winning and losing will come down to turnout. Pitch in to our GOTV Fund today.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

By contributing, you affirm that your contribution is from your personal funds and not from funds otherwise prohibited by law. To comply with state law, we must use best efforts to obtain, maintain, and submit the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals and their spouses, when personal contributions exceed $100 per election cycle. Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019. Lindy Karns, Treasurer._

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: #MoscowMitch is all set to steal the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, #MoscowMitch McConnell has stonewalled almost every election reform proposal Democrats have sent to the Senate, including H.R. 1, the For the People Act, because he knows that protecting our elections and ensuring that the right to vote is secured only hurts the GOP. And nowhere is this clearer than what he's done to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) \-- the number of commissioners dropped to 3 at the end of August, bringing the nation's election regulatory body below the stipulated quorum of 4. They now cannot hold meetings, issue fines, or clarify rules that keep our elections as fair as possible. The door is wide open for campaigns to ignore finance regulations without any repercussions. Foreign governments will have an easier time interfering in the 2020 presidential elections and GOP dark money will flow freely. If you believe that our country needs a fully functioning FEC and Democrats need to fight back against corrupt politicians like Mitch McConnell, we need your donation NOW. [**If every person reading this email gave just $1, we could give Republicans a run for their corporate PAC money in 2020. Can you help us save the FEC and repair the damage Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP have done to our democracy by donating $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddbf/6e9863e8/15c7555a/1db08964/906291994/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191027b.ND&refcode2=TSCAdKV5t7Vj9hU8y9WL") Thank you for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddbf/6e9863e8/15c7555a/1db0896b/906291994/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191027b.ND&refcode2=TSCAdKV5t7Vj9hU8y9WL")

subject: in dire need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I won't mince words with you: My campaign is fighting to stay funded. Meanwhile -- here's what I'm up against: \- Tom Steyer just personally spent $47 MILLION to buy a spot in the next debates. **\- And Joe Biden just went back on his word to reject all super PAC money. ** [_**I refuse to go back on my word to you to build this campaign without a cent from corporate PACs -- even now that I am in dire need of funds to stay in this race and compete against billionaire candidates. It would mean so much to me to have your $5 to hit my make-or-break goal instead. I 'm truly counting on your $5 before I'm forced out of this race. >> **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191027_em_fr_b2_castro_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I mean it when I say this: **If I can 't meet my $800,000 goal before the end of this month -- I will be forced out of this race. ** We've come too far and shattered too many expectations to let it end like this. So many people are counting on us to keep speaking truth to power. Right now, I'm counting on your $5. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc846/3eb3e2fc/55138178/744dadfc/395755290/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191027_em_fr_b2_castro_all_rs")**

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc846/3eb3e2fc/55138178/744dade5/395755290/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc846/3eb3e2fc/55138178/744dade4/395755290/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). name: Cory Booker
subject: re: The debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, **Earlier this week, the DNC raised the debate stage threshold to 200,000 unique donors.** That means in order for me to be on the debate stage in December, we're going to need all hands on deck. **[I know we can do this, but only with your help. Please chip in today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191027_CB_20191027-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Here's the deal, team: **Right now we have 178,731 individual donors -- that means we 're less than 22,000 away.** This is a crowded Democratic primary, and debates offer some of the only opportunities for an underdog campaign like ours to break through -- to get a chance to compete on a level playing field with those other campaigns that are raising tens of millions of dollars. It's more important than ever before to join our team and make sure our collective voices are heard on the national stage. **Can you chip in $1 for the first time and be one of the 21,269 additional unique donors we need to qualify?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191027_CB_20191027-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_express1&amount=1&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's no secret that our campaign is an underdog in the race. I'm used to being counted out -- we've seen it before when I ran for mayor of Newark. And we were doubted when we took on big challenges in the Senate. But we've always come together to win. **[Can you chip in today to help me qualify for the December debates?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191027_CB_20191027-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
We can do this. Thank you for your support.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191027_CB_20191027-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae7/5fca0d19/76e70eb5/291c38f4/1292119495/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae7/5fca0d19/76e70eb5/291c38f3/1292119495/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae7/5fca0d19/76e70eb5/291c38f2/1292119495/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae7/5fca0d19/76e70eb5/291c38f1/1292119495/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae7/5fca0d19/76e70eb5/291c38f5/1292119495/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Tina Smith
subject: Will you join me in defending health care, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The Trump administration argued this summer for the court to issue a ruling that would result in millions of people with pre-existing conditions losing the health care protections they depend on. Now

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191027aca-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

This could be devastating.

Any day, a federal appeals court will deliver its verdict on a case that may upend health care as we know it -- a decision that could invalidate the entire Affordable Care Act.

The Trump administration argued this summer for the court to issue a ruling that would result in millions of people with pre-existing conditions losing the health care protections they depend on.

**I won't sit back and let that happen -- and you can't either.**

**[We've got to show the Trump administration that we will not stop fighting for our health care. Chip in now if you're willing to stand with me in fighting for people across the country who rely on the Affordable Care Act and its protections.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191027aca-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41919/c1f7015/672fa13f/11451ce2/4278163693/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLW9jdDIwMTkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMTkxMDI3YWNhLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191027aca-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41919/c1f7015/672fa13f/11451ce7/4278163693/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLW9jdDIwMTkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMTkxMDI3YWNhLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191027aca-full-exp&amount=25")
---

Special interest groups and Republican leaders want us to be distracted in this moment. They have seen the grassroots strength behind protecting health care, and believe that now is their time to act.

**It's clear they won't stop these attacks until they dismantle health care as we know it. That means no more protections for people with pre-existing conditions, millions losing health care coverage, and the loss of Medicaid expansion in states across the country.

We have to face these attacks with determination and strength. We have won this fight before because of people like you standing up and saying ENOUGH. It's time to do it again.**

**[Will you rush a donation now so that I can keep fighting for health care in the Senate?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191027aca-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for standing with me on this,

Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191027aca-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: inalienable rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Together, we can stand up, flip this district, and send someone to Washington who'll fight for what's right. But I need you to join me.
|
---

| | Friends, Like many, I was deeply concerned about the fate of our democracy after the 2016 election. I still am. I'm running for the 4th District in New Jersey because I need to make sure our democracy is protected--**and that everyone is equal under the law.** For generations, Republicans have fought to strip basic, inalienable rights from communities all over the country--and even the world. And for nearly 40 years, Rep. Chris Smith has stood by silently, rubber stamping this agenda. **[I know I can be a great leader for the 4th District--can you commit to this and donate what you can below?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff084/522d4087/7afd4972/4f3424ab/4287949789/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191026_em_short&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+I+know+I+can+be+a+great+leader+for+the+4&utm_campaign=20191026_em&source=20191026_em")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Chip in $3 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff084/522d4087/7afd4972/4f3424aa/4287949789/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=3&20191026_em_short_abx_3&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+3+now&utm_campaign=20191026_em&source=20191026_em")**

name: Emily Graham
subject: If everyone who opened this email did just one thing...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| |
---
| Hi there,

I know that between impeachment proceedings in the House and a crowded presidential field, there's a lot going on in politics right now. But our future depends on taking back the Senate--we've got to stay focused.

Here's how you can help: **[Kirsten and Off the Sidelines just endorsed Theresa Greenfield for Senate in Iowa](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzMjY5MzgS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTY3MjkxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0). **Theresa's an AMAZING candidate, and we need to flip this seat to retake Senate control.

**We did the math: If everyone reading this email gave between $5 and $10, we could raise over $150,000 for Theresa. In just one email!** That's the incredible power of this community.

So will you do your part and support Theresa today? You can give at this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tgots**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzMjY5MzgS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTY3MjkxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks so much for stepping up!
Emily

Emily Graham
Digital Director, Off the Sidelines

| | **[_We only have 96 hours to save one of the most critical voices in this entire presidential race. Rush $5 to help Juli an meet his End of Month goal. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc84a/3eb3e2fc/551d8399/744dadd7/4043275907/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

subject: More about Iowa Energy and our growing campaign
body:
https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page/?mc_cid=18110a1fc9&mc_eid=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489

https://youtu.be/CSamnFf7Rp0?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489
On Friday, I toured Lincolnway Energy, an ethanol plant in Nevada. It's farmers and producers like these who are bearing the brunt of the EPA's misguided RFS reversal.
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489
Hello,

This week I toured Lincolnway Energy (https://www.lincolnwayenergy.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489) , a locally owned ethanol producer in Story County and spoke with the staff about how the Renewable Fuel Standard has helped bring thousands of jobs to our state. However, right now, Iowa is getting jerked around by the EPA, and that's not how Iowa neighbors treat one another. A simple Iowa value if you make a promise you keep it. The EPA Administrator needs to LIVE up to the promises the government made (https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-enough-is-enough-time-for-trump-administration-to-step-up-for-iowa-farmers-ethanol-producers/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-49197441&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489) ! That is all we are asking for, Iowans invested heavily in an industry that keeps our money from going overseas.
All of the ethanol and biodiesel plants that were making plans to stay open for the rest of the year have to reexamine what they're going to do. We're on the verge of losing an entire industry in Iowa, an industry that supports thousands of jobs and is a major part of the state's economy. I will fight to protect and preserve the integrity of the ethanol industry so that Iowans in the 4th district do not have to worry about losing their livelihood or see investments they made for several decades wiped out by a bureaucrat thumbing his nose at the heartland. We have rules in our country and we follow them, EPA Administrators don't get to ignore laws just because they don't like them.
But I can't fight for ethanol and biodiesel producers like Lincolnway Energy without your support! Please consider donating $5 (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=e1a5b37b53&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489) , $15 (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=2f3e386f4a&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489) or even $25 (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=6361dded9b&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489) to my campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=2b319d1a3a&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489)

Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign team. I look forward to hearing from you!
I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we'll accomplish together that are yet to come!
Your neighbor,
p.s. Earlier in the year I also toured Frontline Bioenergy (https://www.frontlinebioenergy.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489) . Another great Nevada, Iowa company on the cutting edge of renewable fuels.
More on biofuels

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&feature=youtu.be&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489
Biofuels power Iowa's economy and are crucial to job growth in our state. President Trump must direct EPA to change course on SRE waivers. Hear (https://youtu.be/w1HB4hYMDUQ?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489) about my proposal.

Building Our Network
Great to be with the Humboldt County GOP Women on Wednesday to discuss how we need conservative outsiders in Congress to back up President Trump, build the wall, and secure our Southern Border. I also spoke to the Woodbury County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Woodbury-GOP-127360237310973/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489) in Sioux City about how we as Iowa neighbors can get together and solve the big problems facing our nation.

Recent Coverage

https://richardsforcongress.com/4th-district-republican-congressional-candidate-calls-for-firing-of-epa-administrator/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489

https://www.1380kcim.com/news/2019/fourth-district-republican-congressional-candidate-calls-for-firing-of-epa-administrator/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-25822489
