clean_body: On Friday, I toured Lincolnway Energy, an ethanol plant in Nevada. It's farmers and producers like these who are bearing the brunt of the EPA's misguided RFS reversal. Hello, This week I toured Lincolnway Energy () , a locally owned ethanol producer in Story County and spoke with the staff about how the Renewable Fuel Standard has helped bring thousands of jobs to our state. However, right now, Iowa is getting jerked around by the EPA, and that's not how Iowa neighbors treat one another. A simple Iowa value if you make a promise you keep it. The EPA Administrator needs to LIVE up to the promises the government made () ! That is all we are asking for, Iowans invested heavily in an industry that keeps our money from going overseas. All of the ethanol and biodiesel plants that were making plans to stay open for the rest of the year have to reexamine what they're going to do. We're on the verge of losing an entire industry in Iowa, an industry that supports thousands of jobs and is a major part of the state's economy. I will fight to protect and preserve the integrity of the ethanol industry so that Iowans in the 4th district do not have to worry about losing their livelihood or see investments they made for several decades wiped out by a bureaucrat thumbing his nose at the heartland. We have rules in our country and we follow them, EPA Administrators don't get to ignore laws just because they don't like them. But I can't fight for ethanol and biodiesel producers like Lincolnway Energy without your support! Please consider donating $5 () , $15 () or even $25 () to my campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. () Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign team. I look forward to hearing from you! I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we'll accomplish together that are yet to come! Your neighbor, p.s. Earlier in the year I also toured Frontline Bioenergy () . Another great Nevada, Iowa company on the cutting edge of renewable fuels. More on biofuels Biofuels power Iowa's economy and are crucial to job growth in our state. President Trump must direct EPA to change course on SRE waivers. Hear () about my proposal. Building Our Network Great to be with the Humboldt County GOP Women on Wednesday to discuss how we need conservative outsiders in Congress to back up President Trump, build the wall, and secure our Southern Border. I also spoke to the Woodbury County GOP () in Sioux City about how we as Iowa neighbors can get together and solve the big problems facing our nation. Recent Coverage "Congress needs to take decisive, definitive, long-term action to fix the issue [of SREs] once and for all, but in the meantime, President Trump should call Andrew Wheeler into the oval office and utter his most famous phrase, 'You're fired!'" Up Next This week I'll be visiting Morningside College to speak with young Republicans about issues concerning them. I'll also be touring the Crawford County Memorial Hospital to learn more about the current state of our rural healthcare system. Get Involved Donate $20.20 during the month of October and receive a campaign t-shirt as our gift to you! () We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate () we still need your help. FREE yard or barn sign? Want to serve as a county co-chair? Know others who might want to join our team? Send an email to volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com (mailto:volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com) to lend a hand. We wanted to make sure you don't miss your chance to have a beer (or tea, or coffee, or whatever) with Elizabeth! | | |

**We wanted to make sure you don't miss your chance to have a beer (or tea, or coffee, or whatever) with Elizabeth! The contest ends soon!**

She loves getting to meet people from all over the country and learning about what issues motivate them to be a part of this fight.

You can talk to Elizabeth about your community, the big structural change you want to see, and why you're a part of this fight with her.

**But don't wait: this opportunity won't last for long.**

**South Carolina is an extremely tough state for Democrats but if we elect Jaime, we have a real shot at winning back the Senate majority. name: Team Beshear
subject: None of our business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
It's time for this to stop.
|
---

| | Peter,

Matt Bevin bought a mansion at nearly half price from a campaign donor. A donor who Bevin ultimately appointed to a state board position.

When Bevin needed to fill a high-profile position, he just handed it to a buddy without any kind of search. And then he gave his old friend a $215,000 taxpayer-funded raise to make him the highest paid person in his position in the country.

And now we find out that Bevin is taking our state plane all over the country, fundraising for his own campaign. But he still tells Kentuckians that it's none of their business where he goes even though they're the ones stuck with a $360,000 bill.

**It 's time for this to stop.**

We can pull out a huge win in nine days. Polls show this race is a dead heat. **Pitch in to stand up to corruption and bring honesty and decency back to the governor 's office.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue clean_body: It's time for this to stop. | | | Peter, Matt Bevin bought a mansion at nearly half price from a campaign donor. A donor who Bevin ultimately appointed to a state board position. When Bevin needed to fill a high-profile position, he just handed it to a buddy without any kind of search. And then he gave his old friend a $215,000 taxpayer-funded raise to make him the highest paid person in his position in the country. And now we find out that Bevin is taking our state plane all over the country, fundraising for his own campaign. But he still tells Kentuckians that it's none of their business where he goes even though they're the ones stuck with a $360,000 bill. It 's time for this to stop. We can pull out a huge win in nine days. Polls show this race is a dead heat. Pitch in to stand up to corruption and bring honesty and decency back to the governor 's office. name: Laura
subject: our strategy for the rest of the year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
My goal is to get feedback
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa1e/5721a3ed/7124e36a/efaf266/2928424525/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,
As you know, Gary's race is so important to Democrats taking back the Senate - and as one of our top supporters, we can't win without you.
That's why I wanted to reach out to you, personally. We're finalizing our strategy for the year, and we really value the input of active supporters like you.
We designed a Campaign Strategy Survey specifically for our most active supporters, including you. **My goal is to get feedback from another eight folks - including you. ****[Do you have a moment to take it right now? We're meeting with Gary ASAP to talk through the results.](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/gp-top-democratic-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk117-su-in-nd")**
| | | [Start the Campaign Strategy Survey](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/gp-top-democratic-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk117-su-in-nd")
---
Friends, we'd really value your feedback because you understand more than most how much Gary's race matters. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate, but not if Gary loses in Michigan. **And last quarter, our opponent outraised us, so the stakes are higher than ever.**
I know we can count on you. As we put the final strategy pieces into place for this year, your feedback would be so helpful. And it will only take a couple minutes of your time!
**[Click here to submit your feedback for our Campaign Strategy Survey.](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/gp-top-democratic-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk117-su-in-nd")**
- Laura
